steps.title: Match the musical clue
steps.content: The sentence defines the missing quality by saying the language has the same pleasant musical quality on the page as in performance. The blank therefore needs a word meaning tuneful or musical.

steps.title: Reject nonmusical meanings
steps.content: A means academic, not musical. C means harsh or unpleasant, which contradicts pleasant musical quality. D means individual or private, which misses the sound-based clue. The answer is B.
